name: Job Search
description: Concurrent job search workflow plugin with retrieval, evaluator fanout, export, and JSON Resume rendering.

evaluationModel.description: Optional canonical provider/model override for evaluator subagents.

defaultResumeTheme.description: JSON Resume theme package name to use by default when rendering resumes. Use a working installed theme package such as jsonresume-theme-even unless a local custom theme is wired in.
